overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring Night City's urban environment. The clip transitions from covered walkways with teal structural beams to sunlit open plazas surrounded by towering skyscrapers with neon signage, then ascends a large staircase to an upper pedestrian level with food vendors.

events.description: approaching exit of covered walkway into open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway with teal and red structural beams overhead, approaching the open plaza exit

entered.detail: teal and red structural beams forming the roof of the pedestrian passage
white sign with black symbol indicating no cyberware
glowing purple and blue commercial signs on shop fronts

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian walkway characterized by distinctive teal and red structural beams overhead. The camera moves forward through this semi-enclosed space with mixed lighting, passing various shop fronts with neon signage, approaching the bright exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with towering mega-buildings

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright sunlit open plaza
lighting shifts from shaded artificial to bright natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking into the open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers with neon signage

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the street in the plaza area

entered.detail: massive cylindrical skyscraper with gold circular logo near top
green neon sign reading HOSPITAL with arrow
red neon sign with gorilla face and text
tall palm trees lining the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a vast sunlit plaza dominated by a massive cylindrical mega-building with a distinctive circular logo. Neon signs for Hospital and Gorilla Arms glow on the left while palm trees line the pedestrian area. The lighting shifts dramatically to bright natural sunlight as the character moves through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with outdoor seating

events.description: purple sports car drives past on the street
turns left toward large staircase structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking through the plaza toward a large staircase, navigating around outdoor cafe seating

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving along the street

entered.detail: large white umbrellas shading outdoor tables
wide white staircase with teal colored side railings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street through an area with outdoor cafe seating under white umbrellas. A purple sports car drives past as the camera turns left toward a large staircase with distinctive teal railings. The mega-building remains visible but shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: large public staircase connecting building levels

events.description: reaches the top of the staircase

agents.ego_description: running up the large white staircase following an NPC in a red tank top

notable_agents.action: muscular man in red tank top running up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying speed limit and advertisements
food vendor stall with glowing purple neon lights

segments.scene_description: The camera follows an NPC in a red tank top as they ascend a wide white staircase with teal railings. The environment becomes more enclosed with the sky no longer visible. At the top, a digital billboard and a purple neon food stall come into view as the character reaches the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level pedestrian plaza with food vendors

events.description: exits staircase onto upper level plaza with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza past a purple neon food stall and various pedestrians

entered.detail: green neon sign reading CHILLOUT with arrow

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the character explores a plaza featuring a prominent food stall with purple neon lighting. The area is semi-covered with red truss structures overhead. A green CHILLOUT neon sign becomes visible on the right as the camera moves through the moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with dramatic shadows and commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered upper level walkway with dramatic shadows cast by overhead structures, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man with backpack walking in same direction

entered.detail: large screen displaying advertisements and a clock
tall red structural columns of adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a covered walkway where dramatic shadows stripe the ground from overhead structures. The CHILLOUT neon sign draws closer on the right while digital billboards and red building columns appear on the left. The character continues walking through this semi-enclosed commercial area with other pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a semi-enclosed urban walkway into a vast sunlit plaza before ascending to a bustling upper-level commercial district. It begins beneath teal and red structural beams, moving past neon shop fronts toward a bright exit that opens into a wide, sun-drenched plaza dominated by a massive cylindrical mega-building and palm trees. As the camera crosses a street lined with white cafe umbrellas and passing traffic, the scene shifts toward a wide white staircase with teal railings. The perspective then ascends these stairs, leaving the open sky behind to reach an upper pedestrian level characterized by purple neon food stalls and red truss structures. Finally, the camera moves through a covered walkway where dramatic shadows stripe the ground, passing a green CHILLOUT sign and digital billboards amidst a flow of pedestrians.
